usage: create_bump_cluster [-help] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-enclosure {x y}] -layer <name> -pitch {x y} -size {n m} [[-type {signal | power | ground}] | [-nets {net+}]]

options.name: -area
options.description: Specify area to group bump cluster. The default area is the entire floorplan area.

options.name: -enclosure
options.description: Specify distance from bump-array-edge to cluster-metal-edge is a in x-direction and b in y-direction. a and b are unified in all HB cluster groups.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specify metal layer of the cluster.

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specify nets of bump of the cluster. One cluster should have the same net. ((net)+, optional)

options.name: -pitch
options.description: Specify x pitch and y pitch for bumps in the cluster.

options.name: -size
options.description: Specify n*m size of clusters. There are n*m bumps in one cluster.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specify bump type of the cluster.
